creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
Craig Leres <leres@ee.lbl.gov> writes:

> Thanks!
>
>> Committed, thanks. You might want to run portlint in your next patches,
>> as there's some low-hanging fruit there that could be fixed.
>

>
> [...]

Right, it looks like you've got it all covered :-) Sorry for the false
alarm.
